allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/Nkinyampraises/CAMPUS-MARKET/contributors?anon=1" -Headers @{ "User-Agent"="claude" }; $r | ForEach-Object { "{0,-25} type={1} contributions={2}" -f $_.login, $_.type, $_.contributions } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ })
